meta.title: The Role of Medical Innovation and Patents in Defeating the "Invisible Enemy"
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a discussion with top industry experts on the role of patents in funding innovative developments; why some policy-makers have proposed restricting or eliminating patent rights on COVID-19 related treatments or vaccines; and how empowering the private-sector is a likely winning strategy in the battle to defeat the “invisible enemy.”
